TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jakov_Milatović, title = Jakov_Milatović, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jakov_Milatović} }

S.FORM: Jakov Milatović Jakov Milatović (ryax sa 7 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1986 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1986) mrhuw Montenegro ta' misuw hya' ga Jakov Milatović, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Jakov Milatović minkahul sa Titograd na Montenegro. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1986 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 各國領導人列表 canpyuta hknyun

Jakov Milatović Jakov Milatović (ryax sa 7 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1986 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1986) mrhuw Montenegro ta' misuw hya' ga Jakov Milatović, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2023 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Jakov Milatović minkahul sa Titograd na Montenegro. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1986 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 各國領導人列表 canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: *ako* milato*i* *ako* milato*i* (rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw monteneɣro taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *ako* milato*i*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral *ako* milato*i* minkaħul s~ɕa titoɣra* na monteneɣro. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ******* ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
